decisions.decision: Curated the observed takeover-lock heartbeat failure and TUI diagnostic root cause into docs/internals/state-and-reliability.md: renewal contention is distinct from lease loss, one-off contention does not advance generic failures or stand down, repeated contention reports pi-safe diagnostics, heartbeat cycles are serialized, and raw heartbeat/background diagnostics are routed through the pi diagnostic reporter when a pi context is available.
